title: Phase 1 — Robot vacuum + mop

options.name: MOVA E30 Ultra (Dreame sub-brand)
options.excerpt: Mova - E30 Ultra – Smart Robotstøvsuger – 2-i-1 Støvsuger & Moppe … 2.206 kr. Spec from same page (avXperten offer): Dreame Mova E30 2-i-1 Robotstøvsuger med Moppefunktion - 7000Pa - Hvid

options.excerpt: Elgiganten … Roborock autoriseret … Roborock Qrevo 798 rengøringsrobot (hvid) … 3.929 kr.

options.excerpt: Ecovacs Deebot T80 Omni rengøringsrobot 110-2488-0101 (sort) … 7.499 kr. 3.699 kr.

options.name: Ecovacs Deebot N20 Plus (auto-empty only, no mop wash)
options.excerpt: Ecovacs Deebot N20 Plus Hvid … 1.929 kr. — Robotstøvsuger - 400ml, 45W - Hvid

options.name: Dreame L10s Pro Gen 2 (charge-only dock)
options.excerpt: Dreame L10s Pro Gen 2 Vacuum Robot Robotstøvsuger Hvid … 1.569 kr. … 9+ butikker

notes: Constraints: 80 m² laminate + wood-panel floors, no pets, ≤4,000 DKK ceiling, stretch toward auto-empty + auto-mop-wash dock if discount allows, Matter preferred (preserves ecosystem flexibility — see .github/copilot-instructions.md). Caveats from research: Matter support could not be verified from a fetchable manufacturer page for any candidate; if Matter is a hard requirement re-scope to SwitchBot S10 / Roborock S8 MaxV Ultra (well over budget). Suction Pa numbers verified only for MOVA E30 Ultra (7000 Pa); other Pa figures unverified. Warranty rows are Danish statutory minimum (24 mdr, købeloven §83) unless extended — extensions unverified. The Roborock 'QR 798 @ 3,103 DKK' digiexpert listing was eliminated in favour of the 3,929 DKK Elgiganten Roborock-authorized listing because non-authorized RMA friction undercuts the 'durability priority' criterion.
decision: Pending — review scores in the decide UI and confirm or override.
